# tokens

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN тАФ do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Umbrella for CSS token group plugins. Contributes global theme presets.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ThemeEngine.GlobalPreset` "Default", `ThemeEngine.GlobalPreset` "Ocean", `ThemeEngine.GlobalPreset` "Warm"
  - Uses: `ui/theme-engine.ThemeEngine`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`categorical`** тАФ Categorical color palette token group with switchable presets.
  - **`chart`** тАФ Chart color token group with switchable presets.
  - **`color-adjust`** тАФ Cross-cutting color adjustment transform for all color token groups.
  - **`color-palette`** тАФ Color palette token group with switchable presets.
  - **`density`** тАФ Density token group (padding intents) with switchable presets.
  - **`font-family`** тАФ Font-family token group (sans/serif/mono families, letter-spacing) with switchable presets.
    - Plugins:
      - **`google-fonts`** тАФ Loads Google Fonts dynamically for font-family presets referencing custom web fonts.
  - **`rich-text-palette`** тАФ Rich-text color palette token group: the closed --rt-color-<token> vars backing inline text color in the page block editor.
  - **`shadow`** тАФ Shadow token group with switchable presets.
  - **`shape`** тАФ Shape token group (border-radius) with switchable presets.
  - **`sidebar-palette`** тАФ Sidebar palette token group with switchable presets.
  - **`type-scale`** тАФ Type-scale token group (font sizes, line heights, weights) with switchable presets.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
